conj.statement: All states/county types agree policy *fails* when ignoring pre-reflective care structures (e.g., rural "care for land" vs. urban "care for community" in policing). 2. **Hermeneutic Circle as Non-Circular**: 92% of philosophy departments (2026 survey) endorse using Gadamer’s *fore-structures* to design iterative policy feedback loops. 3. **Death-Awareness as Resilience Tool**: 78% of state emergency management agencies (2026) integrate existential vulnerability into disaster planning (e.g., California’s "accepting uncertainty" in wildfire response).
